top_findings.summary: The skill requests "Glob" and "Grep" tool permissions which are excessive for its stated purpose of forecasting model selection. The core functionality (reading time series CSV data, running Python scripts for analysis/benchmarking, and writing results) only requires Read, Write, and Bash permissions. Glob (filesystem pattern matching) and Grep (text search within files) could enable scanning of unrelated files or directories beyond the specific input data file needed for model selection, creating unnecessary data access risks.
